Hire Smarter with AI-Powered Screening

Automated multi-tenant ATS that screens candidates with zero human-in-the-loop AI, tracks bottlenecks, and keeps your hiring pipeline moving.

View Open PositionsHR Dashboard

AI CV Screening

Automatically score and route candidates based on job description match. No manual filtering needed.

Bottleneck Alerts

Real-time alerts when candidates are stuck in any stage too long. Never lose a great hire.

3-Round Pipeline

Tech test, HR interview, and final round — all tracked with timestamps and automated handoffs.
